channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates defeat establishment in New York primaries
item.description: A slate of progressive candidates backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani defeated establishment Democrats in New York's congressional primaries on Tuesday.

item.title: Maryland Delegate Adrian Boafo wins Democratic primary to succeed Rep. Steny Hoyer
item.description: Maryland state Del. Adrian Boafo won his primary Tuesday, advancing to the general election in November to replace retiring Rep. Steny Hoyer.

item.title: House passes bipartisan housing affordability package, sends to Trump
item.description: The House approved a bipartisan set of bills Tuesday aimed at making housing more affordable for Americans.

item.title: New York primaries pit progressives against establishment, Kennedy scion runs
item.description: Democratic incumbents face strong challenges in at least two New York congressional primaries on Tuesday, testing the party's internal divisions.
